purpose: Transparent client identity for moderated QSO-SEEKER outbound retrieval requests.
truthfulness_rules: SOVEREIGN identifies the software client only.
It does not claim governmental, diplomatic, legal, administrative, or repository authority.
It must not override or disguise the authenticated account identity.
It must not spoof Origin, Referer, Host, Forwarded, X-Forwarded-For, IP addresses, cookies, signatures, or authentication headers.
It must respect robots directives, API terms, access controls, rate limits, and source-specific policies.
Services may ignore or reject the custom identity headers without changing SEEKER behavior or permissions.
